prerequisites_before_run: PR #88 merged and deployed to production
book-2b9853ec52 detail page production copy no longer says Audiobook held for QA
production_metadata.lock absent or owned by this run
paid_tts.lock absent or owned by this run
budget env vars present and within cap

skipped_candidates.reason: Missing public controlled-publication source/API visibility in the clean integration branch.
Possible title/body mismatch; clean narration opens with সংস্কার while public title is বলাই.

known_risks: book-f5d593e1f4 is medium risk due longer estimated duration than the two lower-risk candidates.
Canary must stop after any systemic frontmatter, sync, endpoint, or browser failure.
Do not promote generated release_gate artifacts into git.
rollback_strategy: Each title must produce a metadata reset payload before metadata approval.
If any title exposes unsafe audio, apply only that title's reset payload and verify audio-hidden state.
Do not delete uploaded artifacts during rollback; remove public metadata references first.
locks_required: internal/earnalism_intelligence/locks/backend_deploy.lock only if endpoint materialization requires deploy
exact_command: cd /Users/ronikbasak/Documents/GitHub/earnalism-digital-library && source ~/.zshrc && railway run --project a8533934-35c4-463e-9f43-577a9ac391ee --service 5af42e7e-f518-4f6a-b602-d9950866501f --environment 580b250c-80ee-48ad-bfbe-fa4e31a6b378 -- env EARNALISM_APPROVE_BENGALI_FULL_PILOT_TTS=true EARNALISM_BENGALI_FULL_PILOT_MAX_ESTIMATED_USD=24 EARNALISM_STOP_ON_BUDGET_EXCEEDED=true EARNALISM_ENABLE_OPENAI_LISTENING_QA=true EARNALISM_OPENAI_LISTENING_QA_MODEL=gpt-audio EARNALISM_LISTENING_POLICY_VERSION=bengali_audiobook_acceptance_v2_92 EARNALISM_SYNC_POLICY_VERSION=tiered_sync_acceptance_v1 EARNALISM_BENGALI_TTS_PROVIDER=sarvam EARNALISM_BENGALI_TTS_MODEL=bulbul:v3 EARNALISM_BENGALI_TTS_VOICE=ratan EARNALISM_BENGALI_TTS_STYLE=literary_warm_pacing python3 internal/audiobook_lab/scripts/release_catalog_factory.py --manifest book_import_manifest.json --slugs muchiram-gurer-jibanchorit,book-d19e96859f,book-f5d593e1f4 --languages ben --max-books-active 3 --max-preflight-workers 3 --max-cover-workers 1 --max-audio-reuse-workers 0 --max-tts-workers 1 --max-paid-workers 1 --max-asr-workers 1 --max-upload-workers 1 --max-metadata-workers 1 --max-browser-workers 1 --max-attempts 2 --publish-approved --resume-from-latest --fail-closed --stop-after-published 3 --stop-after-terminal-books 3 --max-run-minutes 180
